toast_frame_step_fps_fallback: {{icon:info}} Frame step using fallback {fps} fps (actual rate unknown)
toast_no_last_position: {{icon:rewind}} No previous spot on th' map
feature_tags_hide_on_hover: {{icon:eye}} Ocultar Etiquetas ao Passar o Rato
panel_settings_long_press_desc: Press 'n hold on th' picture to sail at double speed (works best on touch devices)
toast_at_least_one_item_type: {{icon:warning}} Need at least one treasure type, matey
panel_shortcuts_footer: {{icon:info}} Click a key to change it. Press <kbd>Backspace</kbd> while listenin' to reset to default.
panel_settings_auto_pause_desc: Drop anchor when switchin' between decks
panel_settings_custom_pause_screen_desc: Show a fancy screen when th' picture be paused.
panel_settings_auto_resume_desc: Resume sailin' when returnin' to this deck
panel_settings_auto_pip_desc: Automatically use spyglass (PiP) when switchin' between decks
panel_settings_disable_custom_styles_des: Use Jellyfin's default text scroll styles
panel_settings_random_button_enable_desc: Show random treasure button in header
panel_settings_random_button_unwatched_d: Only pick from treasures ye haven't seen
panel_settings_ui_watch_progress_desc: Display voyage progress on treasure detail pages. Choose display mode below.
panel_settings_ui_file_sizes_desc: Display total cargo size on treasure detail pages.
panel_settings_ui_audio_languages_desc: Display available speakin' tongues on detail pages.
panel_settings_ui_genre_tags_desc: Display tale type icons on treasure posters.
panel_settings_ui_language_tags_desc: Display speakin' tongue flags on treasure posters.
panel_settings_ui_quality_tags_desc: Display 4K, HDR, 'n other quality marks on treasure posters.
panel_settings_ui_quality_tags_source: Where the Booty Came From (BluRay, DVD, HDTV, ...)
panel_settings_ui_rating_tags_desc: Display TMDB 'n Rotten Tomatoes reputation on treasure posters.
panel_settings_ui_people_tags_desc: Display age, birthplace, 'n deceased status fer cast members.
panel_settings_ui_hide_tags_on_hover: Ocultar Etiquetas ao Passar o Rato
panel_settings_ui_hide_tags_on_hover_des: Oculta as sobreposições de etiquetas ao passar o rato sobre os cartões para facilitar a visualização dos botões
panel_settings_ui_remove_continue_watchi: Add Remove from Ship's Log Button

Adds an option to remove treasures from th' Ship's Log. Removed items appear in Hidden Content's management page, where each entry has an "Back to Ship's Log" button. Resumin' a hidden item also unhides it automatically. Yer voyage progress is always preserved.
panel_settings_ui_hide_favorites_tab_des: Strikes the Favorites berth from yer Home port (the tab next to Home). Yer treasured booty stays stowed — only the berth be hidden, matey.
panel_footer_close: Press <kbd>?</kbd> or <kbd>Esc</kbd> to lower the sail
seerr_icon_active_tooltip:
Seerr be active
Double-click to show only Seerr treasures
seerr_icon_active_filter_tooltip:
Seerr be active
Double-click to show all treasures
seerr_no_results_jellyfin: Blow me down! No treasures found fer "{query}" on Jellyfin
seerr_err_no_request_permission: Ye have no right to make requests, landlubber!
seerr_err_no_issue_permission: Ye have no right to report issues, scallywag!
seerr_err_no_issue_view_permission: Ye have no right to view issues, bilge rat!
seerr_modal_toast_select_season: {{icon:warning}} Pick at least one season, ye scallywag
seerr_modal_toast_options_missing: {{icon:warning}} Fill in all required options, matey
seerr_modal_toast_select_movie: {{icon:warning}} Pick at least one film, ye landlubber
seerr_toast_collection_fetch_failed: {{icon:error}} Failed to load collection details, blast!
seerr_toast_no_movies_in_collection: {{icon:warning}} No films found in this collection
seerr_toast_no_season_info: {{icon:warning}} Could not load season info, arrr
seerr_quota_usage_window: {label}: {used} of {limit} plundered in th' past {days} days
seerr_quota_dialog_hint: Contact th' captain if ye need yer limit raised.
seerr_quota_reset_in_minutes: Ye can make another demand in about {minutes} min
seerr_quota_reset_in_hours: Ye can make another demand in about {hours} hrs
seerr_quota_reset_in_days: Ye can make another demand in about {days} days
seerr_quota_reset_unavailable: The reset time be lost in the fog fer now.
elsewhere_settings_other_countries: Search Other Ports (leave empty to use home port)
elsewhere_settings_providers: Merchant Ships (leave empty to show all available)
elsewhere_panel_available_in: Also found in {region} at these merchant ships:
elsewhere_panel_not_available_in: Not available on any merchant ships in {region}
elsewhere_panel_no_services_in_regions: No merchant ships sailin' in selected ports
elsewhere_panel_not_available_in_regions: Not available on any merchant ships in {regions}
toast_generic_error: {{icon:error}} Shiver me timbers! Somethin' went wrong!
random_button_tooltip: Show a random treasure from yer library (R)
remove_continue_watching_error: Could not remove treasure: User or Treasure ID not found.
hidden_content_save_failed_persistent: Couldn't save yer hidden cargo changes. Reload th' ship's manifest and try again.
seerr_report_unavailable_toast: Can't report this treasure (no TMDB match, matey)
seerr_report_issue_message_placeholder: Describe what be wrong in detail…
seerr_load_issues_error: Could not load th' problem list
pausescreen_fetch_error: Unable to fetch treasure info, blast!
pausescreen_no_description: No tale to tell about this one.
reviews_delete_confirm: Delete yer tale fer this title?
reviews_admin_delete_confirm: Send {user}'s review to Davy Jones' Locker? There be no turnin' back.
reviews_delete_error_body: Could not send th' review to Davy Jones' Locker: {err}
reviews_form_error_empty: Add a star rank or write a tale before ye save.
reviews_form_error_save: Failed t' save yer tale. Try again, matey.
panel_settings_language_display_desc: Pick th' speakin' tongue fer Jellyfin Canopy interface. Changes take effect after reloadin' th' page.
panel_settings_language_clear_cache_desc: Tosses cached translations overboard and reloads th' locale shipped with th' installed plugin.
toast_translation_cache_cleared: {{icon:trash}} Translation hold cleared! {count} cached translation(s) thrown overboard. Reloadin'…
bookmark_file_changed: File may've changed since this spot was marked
bookmark_delete_confirm: Ye sure ye want to toss this marked spot overboard?
bookmark_no_duplicates: No duplicates found! All marked spots be unique, arrr.
bookmark_duplicate_subtitle: Found {count} treasure(s) with marked spots across multiple versions
bookmark_split_versions: {count} total marked spot(s) split across {versions} version(s)
bookmarks_library_empty_hint: Press 'B' while watchin' to mark a spot, ye scallywag!
toast_bookmark_no_item: {{icon:error}} Cannot mark a spot: No treasure found
toast_bookmark_fetch_failed: {{icon:error}} Failed to fetch treasure details, blast!
bookmark_cleanup_complete: Cleanup complete: threw {count} abandoned bookmarks overboard
bookmark_delete_all_confirm: Throw ALL bookmarks overboard? This cannot be undone, matey!
bookmark_deleted_all: All bookmarks sent to Davy Jones' locker
bookmark_empty_hint: Switch tabs or mark a spot while watchin', ye scallywag.
bookmark_no_synced: No synced bookmarks in th' hold
bookmark_synced_info_title: These bookmarks were hauled in from another file version
bookmark_synced_info_body: Use this tool to shift all bookmark timestamps if th' new file has different intro/timin' (e.g., +5 or -10 seconds). Use 0 to just clear th' sync markers.
bookmark_offset_help: Positive values shift forward, negative values shift backward, 0 clears th' haul markers only
bookmark_offset_cleared: Cleared haul markers fer {count} marked spot(s)
bookmark_no_replacement: No replacement treasure found in yer hold
bookmark_search_failed: Could not scour yer hold for a replacement treasure. Try again.
bookmark_no_orphaned: No abandoned bookmarks found, all hands accounted fer!
bookmark_orphaned_no_replacement: Found {count} abandoned bookmark(s), but no replacement treasures in yer hold
bookmark_orphaned_search_failed: The replacement hunt failed for {count} abandoned bookmark(s). No migrations were offered.
bookmark_merge_confirm: Move {count} bookmark(s) from th' source chart(s) into th' chosen chart? Bookmarks already aboard th' chosen chart won't be doubled, an' th' source bookmarks walk th' plank only after th' merge be saved.
bookmark_merge_success: {{icon:success}} Merge complete — {count} new bookmark(s) hoisted aboard th' chosen chart
bookmark_time_format_hint: Enter time as seconds or HH:MM:SS
toast_api_client_unavailable: API client not be available, arrr
requests_action_error: Blast! Couldn't update the request. Try again.
hidden_content_toggle_desc: Hide specific treasures and tales from all sailin' surfaces
spoiler_blur_pending_enabled_toast: Spoiler Guard will stand watch once this title sails into yer library.
spoiler_blur_pending_disabled_toast: Spoiler Guard furled fer this title.
spoiler_blur_pending_error_toast: Couldn't change th' Spoiler Guard fer this title. Check th' console.
spoiler_blur_enabled_toast: Spoiler Guard hoisted. Unwatched episodes will be fogged over.
spoiler_blur_enabled_movie_toast: Spoiler Guard hoisted. Film images will be fogged over till ye've watched 'em.
spoiler_blur_enabled_collection_toast: Spoiler Guard hoisted. Films in this collection will be fogged over till each be watched.
spoiler_blur_error_toast: Spoiler Guard change failed. Check th' console.
spoiler_disable_confirm_body: Unfogged images 'n episode details will be back in plain sight straight away.
panel_settings_spoiler_guard_overrides_s: Show me this even with Spoiler Guard hoisted
panel_settings_spoiler_guard_override_ov: Uncheck to spy th' original yarn instead o' th' stand-in text.
panel_settings_spoiler_guard_override_ti: Uncheck to spy th' real episode names instead o' "Season X, Episode Y".
panel_settings_spoiler_guard_override_ch: Uncheck to spy chapter names 'n thumbnails on unwatched episodes.
panel_settings_spoiler_guard_override_ca: Uncheck to spy th' full crew (guest stars 'n all) on unwatched episodes.
panel_settings_spoiler_guard_override_ra: Uncheck to spy th' crew an' critics' reputations on unwatched episodes.
panel_settings_spoiler_guard_override_ai: Uncheck to spy when each unwatched episode first set sail.
panel_settings_spoiler_guard_override_ta: Uncheck to spy TMDB battle cries like "Everything changes tonight".
Uncheck to spy story marks like "Death of a main character".
panel_settings_spoiler_guard_override_re: Uncheck to spy th' TMDB / crew tales panel on series detail pages.
panel_settings_spoiler_guard_skip_confir: Don't ask me to confirm when I furl th' Spoiler Guard
Skip th' furl-confirmation dialog. Saves ye a click when furlin' th' Spoiler Guard fer a series.
hidden_content_manage_desc: View and manage all hidden treasures
hidden_content_clear_confirm: Ye sure ye want to show all treasures? This can't be undone, matey!
hidden_content_unhide_all_confirm: Show all treasures fer this tale?
hidden_content_filter_library_desc: Hide treasures from native Jellyfin hold views
hidden_content_filter_discovery_desc: Hide treasures from Seerr discovery pages
hidden_content_filter_search_desc: Hide treasures from search results (Jellyfin and Seerr)
hidden_content_filter_calendar_desc: Hide treasures from th' calendar view
hidden_content_filter_requests_desc: Hide treasures from th' demands/plunder page
hidden_content_confirm_body: This'll hide this treasure from all sailin' surfaces (hold, search, huntin', etc.). Ye can show it later from Settings → Hidden Booty.
hidden_content_show_buttons_desc: Show th' eye icon buttons fer hidin' content. Turnin' this off keeps hidden treasures filtered but removes th' buttons.
hidden_content_confirm_toggle_desc: Show a confirmation dialog before hidin' treasures
hidden_content_show_button_seerr_desc: Show th' hide button on Seerr discovery and search cards
hidden_content_show_button_library_desc: Show th' hide button on native Jellyfin hold cards
hidden_content_show_button_details_desc: Show th' hide button on treasure detail pages
hidden_content_show_button_cast_desc: Show th' hide button on crew and performer cards in detail pages
hidden_content_confirm_surface_title: What would ye like to hide?
hidden_content_confirm_surface_body: Choose how ye'd like to hide this treasure.
hidden_content_confirm_hide_scoped: Hide from Settin' Sail & Voyage Log only
hidden_content_episode_choice_title: What would ye like to hide?
hidden_content_episode_choice_body: Ye can hide just this episode or th' entire tale from all surfaces.
hidden_content_filter_nextup_desc: Hide treasures from th' Settin' Sail section on th' home port
hidden_content_filter_continue_desc: Hide treasures from th' Voyage Log section
hidden_content_experimental_collections_: Allow hidin' My Treasures holds, collections, and playlists
hidden_content_admin_readonly_note: Look but don't touch — spyin' another matey's buried booty
hidden_content_admin_load_error: Couldn't haul this matey's buried booty aboard. Click to try again.
hidden_content_admin_add_search: Hunt for a title to bury…
hidden_content_admin_add_hint: Hunt for a film or show to bury for this matey.
hidden_content_admin_add_none: No such loot in these waters.
session_control_preset_stopping: Yer stream be bein' scuttled by the cap'n.
session_control_preset_restart: The ship be settin' sail anew shortly — belay yer stream, matey.
session_control_preset_bandwidth: Trim yer sails and lower yer quality — the ship be groanin' under load.
session_control_preset_takedown: This booty be walkin’ the plank; playback be stoppin’ soon.
panel_settings_subtitles_position_note: Ye must set Jellyfin subtitle style to Custom in th' subtitle settings
arr_search_error_forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
arr_search_not_arr_item: This item isn't managed by Sonarr or Radarr.
arr_search_interactive_unsupported: Interactive search isn't available for a whole series — open a season or episode.
arr_search_not_tracked: This item isn't in any configured Sonarr/Radarr instance yet.
arr_search_grab_sent: Release sent to the download client.
arr_search_grab_sent_downloads: Release grabbed — track it on the Downloads page.
arr_search_add_missing_fields: Choose a quality profile and root folder.
arr_search_started_downloads: Search started on {count} instance(s) — track it on the Downloads page.
discovery_empty: Descobrir não está disponível de momento.
discovery_customize_hint: Escolhe que linhas mostrar e a sua ordem. Marca para incluir uma linha; usa as setas para reordenar.
pages_signin_required: Sign in to view this page, matey.
anime_filler_setting_desc: Mark episodes the charts call filler, matey.
theme_studio_description: Build, preview, validate, and save a personal Canopy theme without changing the server on every control.
theme_studio_unavailable: Theme Studio is unavailable or the saved document was quarantined. Reload authoritative server data to recover.
theme_studio_invalid: The document is not a valid Theme Studio configuration
theme_studio_error_validation: The server rejected this theme. Review the highlighted values.
theme_studio_error_authorization: This account is not allowed to save that theme.
theme_studio_error_conflict: The server theme changed elsewhere. Your draft is preserved; reload before saving again.
theme_studio_error_unavailable: The server could not verify the save. Your draft is preserved.
theme_studio_error_cancelled: The save was cancelled because the signed-in identity changed.
theme_studio_error_protocol: The server acknowledgement did not match this theme. Reload before retrying.
theme_studio_underline_links: Underline links as a non-color cue
theme_studio_expert_hint: Valid edits preview after a short pause. Invalid JSON is never applied or saved.
theme_studio_import_invalid: That file is not a valid Theme Studio document
theme_studio_preset_canopy_desc: Balanced Canopy identity with crisp navigation, readable surfaces, and restrained depth.
theme_studio_preset_minimal_desc: Quiet, efficient surfaces with limited effects and compact visual hierarchy.
theme_studio_preset_cinematic_desc: Image-led detail and home layouts with dramatic depth and generous spacing.
theme_studio_preset_glass_desc: Layered translucent materials with capability-aware blur and safe fallbacks.
theme_studio_preset_material_desc: Structured controls, clear elevation, and familiar Material-inspired rhythm.
theme_studio_preset_studio_desc: Dense creator-focused presentation with strong metadata and precise controls.
theme_studio_preset_tv_focus_desc: Large targets, emphatic focus rings, and ten-foot navigation behavior.
theme_studio_preset_oled_desc: True-black foundations, restrained highlights, and low-light viewing comfort.
theme_studio_preset_high_contrast_desc: Strong borders, non-color cues, reduced ambiguity, and maximum legibility.
